title: GitLab report engine
objective: Implement server-side GitLab integration, report aggregation, fixture fallback, and targeted tests for executive reporting.
scope_in: Aggregation logic for KPIs, rollups, and flags
acceptance_criteria: A project or group ID can be transformed into a report payload
The report includes KPIs, recent MRs, rollups, and attention flags
Tests validate the aggregation behavior with fixtures
verification: Targeted unit tests for aggregation logic
notes: Use recent merge-request activity rather than raw GitLab payloads for the executive view.
